sections.paragraph:
- Original: Σαλαθιήλ

- Transliteration: Salathiel

- Phonetic: sal-ath-ee-ale'

- Definition: Shealtiel = "I have asked of God"

1. the son of Jeconiah in the genealogy of Christ

- Origin: of hebrew origin H7597

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H7597]; Salathiel (that is Shealtiel) an Israelite: - Salathiel.
